name: v1alpha1Backoff
description: v1alpha1Backoff schema from Argo CD API

duration.name: Duration is the amount to back off. Default unit is seconds, but could also be a duration (e.g. "2m", "1h")

factor.name: Factor is a factor to multiply the base duration after each failed retry

maxDuration.name: MaxDuration is the maximum amount of time allowed for the backoff strategy
